meanings.definition: an instance of rapid strong pulsation (of the heart)
examples: he felt a throbbing in his head

meanings.definition: a sound with a strong rhythmic beat
pulsate or pound with abnormal force
expand and contract rhythmically; beat rhythmically
examples: The baby's heart was pulsating again after the surgeon massaged it

meanings.definition: tremble convulsively, as from fear or excitement
pounding or beating strongly or violently
examples: the throbbing engine of the boat
